chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُكَاتَبِ يَقْتُلُ الْحُرَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الْحُرِّ يَقْتُلُ الْمُكَاتَبَ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 24 – The contracted slave kills the free or injures him, and the free kills the contracted slave or injures him

text: رَجُلٍ حُرٍّ قَتَلَ عَبْداً قِيمَتُهُ عِشْرُونَ أَلْفَ دِرْهَمٍ فَقَالَ لَا يَجُوزُ أَنْ يُتَجَاوَزَ بِقِيمَةِ عَبْدٍ أَكْثَرَ مِنْ دِيَةِ حُرٍّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Hassan Bin Mahboub, from Al Hassan Bin Salih,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a free man who kills a slave who value is twenty thousand Dirham. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not allowed that the value of a slave should be more than the wergild of a free’.
